message:
fix(virtualized): prevent i32→i16 overflow in y-offset calculation

The y_offset variable is computed as i32 (relative_idx * fixed_height),
but was cast directly to i16 before passing to saturating_add_signed.
If y_offset exceeded i16 range (±32767), the cast would wrap, causing
items to render at incorrect positions.

Fixed by computing the y coordinate directly in i32 arithmetic and
clamping to u16 range:
  i32::from(area.y).saturating_add(y_offset).clamp(0, i32::from(u16::MAX))

Also ran cargo fmt to fix formatting issues in related files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
